name: Cream of Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a deep saucepan over medium heat until foaming, then reduce to 200°.
2. Gradually stir in flour and whisk until smooth. Reduce heat as needed.
3. Slowly add sour cream, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup, hot milk, and water, whisking thoroughly. Add more milk if desired for consistency.
5. Gently fold in Parmesan cheese until fully incorporated. Bring mixture to a simmer.
6. Gradually stir in white wine, then season with pepper, cayenne, oregano, and thyme.
7. Simmer until the sauce reaches your preferred thickness.
(Note: The original recipe calls for several steps that involve heating the butter and allowing moisture to evaporate before adding ingredients. This has been simplified into a single step in the revised instructions.)
